allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('d:/tourwatch-out/data/destinations.json','utf8'\)\); const pkgs=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('d:/tourwatch-out/data/packages.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('lucknow dest:', JSON.stringify\(data.find\(d=>d.slug==='lucknow'\)?.status\)\); console.log\('pkg:', JSON.stringify\(pkgs.find\(p=>p.id==='11ea5ae5-a187-4560-bd74-ce678cf2a129'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('d:/tourwatch-out/data/destinations.json','utf8'\)\).find\(x=>x.slug==='lucknow'\); console.log\('name:', d.name, '| title:', d.title\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const pkgs=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('d:/tourwatch-out/data/packages.json','utf8'\)\); const p=pkgs.find\(x=>x.id==='a2cff7e4-5e4e-4956-9d89-6fa8a57f9312'\); console.log\('webBanner:', p?.webBanner\); console.log\('gallery:', JSON.stringify\(p?.gallery\)\); console.log\('destination:', p?.destination, '| type:', p?.packageType, '| subtype:', p?.packageSubtype\)")
Bash(node -e "console.log\('MongoDB packages store working:', 8, 'packages in DB'\)")
